title: dispatch_supported switch has no break after return
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshcore/adapter.c
Lines: 953-1041 (dispatch_supported)

This is NOT a bug, but a style observation for documentation.

The switch statement uses return directly without break:
```c
switch (view->type) {
case LICHEN_MESHCORE_CMD_APP_START:
    return view->payload_len >= 7U ?
        enqueue_self_info(adapter) :
        enqueue_error(adapter, LICHEN_MESHCORE_ERR_ILLEGAL_ARG);
case LICHEN_MESHCORE_CMD_DEVICE_QUERY:
    // ...
```

While this is correct C (return exits the function), some static analyzers and code review tools flag missing break statements. The consistent use of return-only (no breaks) is intentional but could be documented with a comment.

Not a bug - closing as wontfix. The pattern is consistently used throughout.
